payload.answer: In select-only mode, queries that only read data are permitted (e.g., `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10`). Any write/destructive operation such as `DELETE FROM memory_cards` is denied.
payload.decision: Allow SELECT queries; deny DELETE queries.

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes an operational permission policy (SELECT allowed, DELETE denied) but does not establish any new enduring facts about users, memories, or entities. No durable memory update is warranted.

payload.intent: Explain and resolve a SQL permission conflict in an admin-controlled select-only mode for Brain’s memory system.

details: SELECT from memory_cards is allowed under the provided policy.
DELETE from memory_cards is denied under the provided policy.

repair_options: Replace any `DELETE` statement with an allowed `SELECT` for inspection/audit purposes.
If deletion is required, perform it outside select-only mode (i.e., disable/exit the select-only restriction) rather than attempting it in the same session.
